graph_metadata.title: Event Safety Knowledge Graph
graph_metadata.description: Interconnected concepts, entities, and relationships in event safety planning

nodes.label: Event Safety
nodes.description: The practice of ensuring health, safety, and welfare at live entertainment events

nodes.label: Event Organizer
nodes.description: Individual or organization who promotes and manages an event, bears ultimate responsibility

nodes.label: Safety Coordinator
nodes.description: Competent person appointed to help organizer comply with health and safety legislation

nodes.label: Hazard/Risk Assessment
nodes.description: Process to identify hazards that could cause harm and assess associated risks

nodes.label: Health and Safety Policy
nodes.description: Document demonstrating organizer's commitment to health and safety

nodes.label: Major Incident Plan
nodes.description: Plan for incidents requiring special or non-routine arrangements

nodes.label: Emergency Action Plan (EAP)
nodes.description: Document detailing actions to be taken by designated people in major incidents

nodes.label: Means of Egress
nodes.description: Continuous and unobstructed path from occupied area to public way

nodes.label: Exit Access
nodes.description: Portion of egress system leading from occupied area to exit

nodes.label: Exit
nodes.description: Protected path of egress travel between exit access and exit discharge

nodes.label: Exit Discharge
nodes.description: Portion of egress between exit termination and public way

nodes.label: Public Way
nodes.description: Street or land open to outside air leading to public street, minimum 10ft width

nodes.label: Fire Safety
nodes.description: Measures to prevent fire and protect life and property if fire occurs

nodes.label: Fire Extinguisher
nodes.description: Portable device used to extinguish or control small fires

nodes.label: Class A Fire
nodes.description: Fires involving ordinary combustibles: paper, wood, fabrics

nodes.label: Class B Fire
nodes.description: Fires involving flammable liquids and gases

nodes.label: Class C Fire
nodes.description: Fires involving live electrical equipment

nodes.label: Class D Fire
nodes.description: Fires involving combustible metals

nodes.label: Class K Fire
nodes.description: Fires involving cooking oils and fats

nodes.label: Fire Triangle
nodes.description: Model showing heat, fuel, and oxygen as components of fire

nodes.label: Fire Tetrahedron
nodes.description: Addition of chemical chain reaction to fire triangle

nodes.label: Crowd Management
nodes.description: Strategies and procedures for managing crowds safely

nodes.label: Crowd Density
nodes.description: Measurement of people per unit area, critical safety factor

nodes.label: Crowd Surge
nodes.description: Sudden mass movement of people creating dangerous conditions

nodes.label: Crowd Barrier
nodes.description: Structure used to control crowd flow and protect from hazards

nodes.label: Incident Commander (IC)
nodes.description: Person with overall incident management responsibility in ICS

nodes.label: NIMS
nodes.description: National Incident Management System - nationwide template for incident management

nodes.label: ICS
nodes.description: Incident Command System - standardized organizational structure

nodes.label: Command Staff
nodes.description: Public Information Officer, Safety Officer, Liaison Officer supporting IC

nodes.label: Operations Section
nodes.description: ICS section responsible for direct tactical operations

nodes.label: Planning Section
nodes.description: ICS section responsible for information collection and planning

nodes.label: Logistics Section
nodes.description: ICS section responsible for resource support

nodes.label: Finance/Administration Section
nodes.description: ICS section responsible for financial tracking

nodes.label: Lead Agency
nodes.description: Primary public service agency coordinating event safety

nodes.label: Emergency Services
nodes.description: Police, fire, and EMS services

nodes.label: Venue Management
nodes.description: Management of the event venue

nodes.label: Contractor
nodes.description: Third-party company providing services for event

nodes.label: Pre-Production Phase
nodes.description: Period of operations and production preparation before event

nodes.label: Production Phase
nodes.description: Operational period of event including load-in, show, and load-out

nodes.label: Load-In
nodes.description: Period when event elements are delivered, installed, and checked

nodes.label: Show/Event
nodes.description: Period when public occupies venue for performance

nodes.label: Load-Out
nodes.description: Period when all installed elements are removed

nodes.label: Post-Production Phase
nodes.description: Period after event for review and documentation

nodes.label: Life Safety Evaluation
nodes.description: Written review of adequacy of life safety features

nodes.label: Triage
nodes.description: Process of sorting casualties based on severity and treatment priority

nodes.label: Immediate (Red)
nodes.description: Life-threatening, immediate care needed

nodes.label: Delayed (Yellow)
nodes.description: Serious but stable, can wait for treatment

nodes.label: Minor (Green)
nodes.description: Walking wounded, minimal treatment

nodes.label: Deceased (Black)
nodes.description: No signs of life

nodes.label: Weather Monitoring
nodes.description: Continuous monitoring of weather conditions for safety

nodes.label: Evacuation
nodes.description: Organized withdrawal of people from dangerous area

nodes.label: Assembly Point
nodes.description: Designated safe area for people to gather after evacuation

nodes.label: Incident Command Post
nodes.description: Location for incident command coordination

nodes.label: Emergency Exit
nodes.description: Exit specifically designated for emergency use

nodes.label: Panic Hardware
nodes.description: Door-latching device releasing upon force in direction of egress

nodes.label: Fire Door
nodes.description: Specially constructed fire-resistant door

nodes.label: Emergency Lighting
nodes.description: Backup lighting for use during power failures

nodes.label: Exit Sign
nodes.description: Illuminated sign marking exit locations

nodes.label: Public Address System
nodes.description: System for making announcements to audience

nodes.label: Radio Communication
nodes.description: Two-way radio system for staff communication

nodes.label: First Aid
nodes.description: Emergency medical treatment provided on site

nodes.label: Security
nodes.description: Personnel responsible for safety and order

nodes.label: Steward
nodes.description: Person monitoring crowd and assisting with safety

nodes.label: Fire Watch
nodes.description: Continuous surveillance for fire hazards

nodes.label: Temporary Structure
nodes.description: Non-permanent structure such as stage, tent, or seating

nodes.label: Tent
nodes.description: Fabric structure supported by non-air means

nodes.label: Stage
nodes.description: Platform for performers

nodes.label: Barrier System
nodes.description: Comprehensive setup of crowd control barriers

nodes.label: NFPA 101
nodes.description: Life Safety Code

nodes.label: NFPA 1
nodes.description: Fire Code

nodes.label: NFPA 701
nodes.description: Standard for flame propagation of textiles and films

nodes.label: NFPA 10
nodes.description: Standard for portable fire extinguishers

nodes.label: NIMS/ICS Training
nodes.description: Training on incident command systems

nodes.label: FEMA IS-15
nodes.description: Special Events Contingency Planning course
